strongest_review_quote.text: My father was an electrician and he was planning to fit a cooker for my nan, unfortunately he passed away. I rang Choudhary and he got it done, the man is a saint and understood what my nan was going through and did not charge! The whole family will be praying for you Choudhary! She will definitely be using him again.
strongest_review_quote.author: Aiden
